feed.title: Computers And Stuff
feed.subtitle: A minimal, responsive, and powerful Jekyll theme for presenting professional writing.

entry.title: The Brain of A Hotel - Hac... or Inspecting the Tech Inside Hotels

link.title: The Brain of A Hotel - Hac... or Inspecting the Tech Inside Hotels

entry.summary: NOTE: The contents in this post are for educational purposes. Do not attempt any of the actions outlined here. You could get banned from hotels, fined, and make an IT guy’s job a lot harder. I recently stayed at a couple of hotels over the summer and as always I had to see what tech powered them. Both hotels were clean and I had a good stay except for the unexpected wakeup call. The first ho...

entry.title: New site! How it's going after moving to Jekyll and GitHub Pages

link.title: New site! How it's going after moving to Jekyll and GitHub Pages

entry.summary: If you’re reading this you probably noticed the change. No longer am I using blogspot/blogger to post my updates, I am now using Github pages and a static site generator called Jekyll. It’s been a bit of a bumpy start to learn how the software works, but that’s what happens with software. Trial and error will bring you closer to success (usually). After messing around with Jekyll’s settings, ...

entry.title: UART (no root yet) on Nest Camera A0005 model

link.title: UART (no root yet) on Nest Camera A0005 model

entry.summary: In my constant search of rootable devices I came across an indoor nest camera. Personally I think the cameras have good quality and nice features, but my problem with them is that they will only work through google’s servers. So I cracked one open to see what I could find inside. Make sure to check out the references and resources at the bottom of the page for a lot more information on this c...

entry.title: One workaround to accessing Docker containers connected to VPNs (Windscribe)

link.title: One workaround to accessing Docker containers connected to VPNs (Windscribe)

entry.summary: Putting a docker container behind a VPN can be useful in many ways. For instance you can have a web service torrent client like transmission running in a docker container and not have your ISP throttle your speed after detecting where the high traffic is coming from… Or perhaps download files from sites that aren’t available in your area. When I setup a simple docker container with Windscribe...

entry.title: Best Way to Automatically Switch to Dark Mode in Windows 10

link.title: Best Way to Automatically Switch to Dark Mode in Windows 10

entry.summary: If you’re like me you don’t like bright whites on applications burning your eyes while using your PC in the later hours and you also like to have a bright screen during the day when the sun is shining. Windows does have a dark and light theme, but they do not switch automatically, meaning you will have to go into settings and do it yourself. To fix this issue I did some task scheduler magic t...
